releases.title: v3.4.41
releases.summary: This patch makes Event social visibility easier to understand in the drawer, especially on mobile where private, group, selected, and shared plans need to be readable at a glance.

releases.title: v3.4.40
releases.summary: This patch makes Event schedule plans easier to adjust from the drawer by adding compact in-place controls for planning status, sharing visibility, and notes.

releases.title: v3.4.39
releases.summary: This patch makes Event meetups easier to manage during planning or day-of-con use by adding compact in-place controls for meetup status and quick notes.

releases.title: v3.4.38
releases.summary: This patch adds a compact mobile overview to Event plans so phone users can quickly see the next schedule item, next meetup, people, and groups before opening the detailed planning sections.

releases.title: v3.4.37
releases.summary: This patch improves the Event drawer's personal Sched feed status so sync failures, stale feeds, and never-synced feeds are easier to understand without making the selected schedule feel broken.

releases.title: v3.4.36
releases.summary: This patch makes Event schedule removal safer by lowering the visual weight of the expanded-row remove action while keeping it available when a user intentionally opens a schedule item.

releases.title: v3.4.35
releases.summary: This patch improves expanded Event schedule rows so selected sessions show full details clearly without making the default agenda scan view heavier.

releases.title: v3.4.34
releases.summary: This patch improves long Event schedules by adding lightweight day navigation, an Upcoming filter, and a local-time now/next affordance to the selected schedule agenda.

releases.title: v3.4.33
releases.summary: This patch makes Event schedule plans easier to read in the detail drawer. The schedule now appears before feed and social management, and planned sessions are shown as a compact day-grouped agenda instead of a stack of large cards.

releases.title: v3.4.32
releases.summary: This patch expands personal Sched ICS schedule plans so synced sessions carry more of the useful detail Sched provides, and updates the Event drawer to show those details more clearly.
